### 主要项目
<p align="left">
<a href="https://pluv27.top/foss/heurams/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/HeurAMS-545f70?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="HeurAMS" /></a>
<a href="https://pluv27.top/foss/afi/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/AFI-545f70?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="AFI" /></a>
</p>

<blockquote>拉取请求可在任意平台提交, 通过的拉取请求将自动同步到 <code>git.pluv27.top</code> 和所有平台.<br/>不需要另外注册账号 :)</blockquote>

如果您对间隔重复有兴趣, 欢迎看看 HeurAMS "潜进" 项目 :)
